label: Legibility Trap Detector Pattern
description: Pattern for detecting when institutions respond to inference failure by demanding more machine-readable behavior instead of replacing inference with verification infrastructure.

nodes.label: Legibility Trap Detector Pattern
nodes.description: Pattern for detecting when institutions respond to inference failure by demanding more machine-readable behavior instead of replacing inference with verification infrastructure.

nodes.label: Subject
nodes.description: Person or organization whose behavior is made more legible to machines

nodes.label: Platform
nodes.description: Digital service expanding proxies or machine-readable burdens

nodes.label: Governance Authority
nodes.description: Authority responsible for limiting extraction and requiring verification alternatives

nodes.label: Assessor
nodes.description: Evaluator of proxy expansion and verification alternatives
